posts.author: RajAnalyst
posts.text: As per the earnings call, the company’s top line could even double from this level in about two years as the new capacities come on stream. Perhaps the margins could shrink by 2-3 bps

posts.author: Midhunjoe
posts.text: Websol results are out. Good overall. As expected margins have dropped due to higher module output. Concall scheduled for April 28 th image 1640×599 61.3 KB
